transfer.workflow.Description.Description: Specifies the text description for the workflow.

transfer.workflow.OnExceptionSteps.Description: Specifies the steps (actions) to take if errors are encountered during execution of the workflow.

transfer.workflow.Steps.Description: Specifies the details for the steps that are in the specified workflow.

transfer.workflow.Tags.Description: Key-value pairs that can be used to group and search for workflows. Tags are metadata attached to workflows for any purpose.
